name: create-agent-adapter
tagline: Detailed reference for building Paperclip agent adapters (server/UI/CLI surfaces) bridging orchestration to specific agent runtimes.
verdict: Thorough, highly actionable technical reference with strong built-in security guidance (secret injection via env not prompts, treating agent output as untrusted). Weak spots: no negative-trigger scoping, no versioning signal, and the 716-line SKILL.md packs reference-style tables inline instead of splitting them into references/ files.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere despite broad triggers ('new CLI agent, API agent, custom process').
Reference-style tables (section 9 TranscriptEntry Kinds, section 6 Server-Utils Helpers) sit inline in a 716-line SKILL.md rather than split into references/ files.
SKILL.md is roughly 716 lines, over the ~500-line budget though under the 2x fail ceiling.
